description_long: This is a compact, two-story brick house with a modern, minimalist design. The exterior is primarily composed of red brick, accented by large, rectangular wooden panels and doors. The house features a prominent staircase leading up to the main entrance, which is set above ground level and accessed via a concrete walkway. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a large glass window on one side and smaller, vertically aligned windows on the other. The flat roof and clean lines give the structure a contemporary urban feel. The overall appearance is functional and geometric, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with wooden accents, a flat roof, and a raised entry accessed by stairs and a concrete walkway.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with two large wooden panels and the staircase leading up from the ground to the entry platform.
description_view_1: This view highlights a large glass window and the concrete walkway extending from the house, with minimal visible doors or panels.
description_view_2: This view displays the rear of the house, featuring a unique wooden panel arrangement and the staircase from a different angle.
description_view_3: This view presents the front of the house, showing the main entry door, multiple wooden panels, and the staircase leading directly to the entrance.
attribute_entryway_design: Raised entry with a straight staircase, solid wooden door, and no porch or overhang
